items.text: Aviate_Decider maintains internal variable numberServicesTrue that counts true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS
items.fragment: Aviate_Decider maintains internal variable numberServicesTrue that counts true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS
items.requirement_fragment: Aviate_Decider maintains internal variable numberServicesTrue that counts true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS

items.text: Aviate_Decider implements dynamicDecide logic: when inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is sufficient to prevent secondary collision, decision is ACAS; otherwise decision is GCAS
items.fragment: Aviate_Decider implements dynamicDecide logic: when inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is sufficient to prevent secondary collision, decision is ACAS; otherwise decision is GCAS

items.text: Aviate_Decider sets outDec to dynamic decision result when numberServicesTrue >= 2; otherwise outDec defaults to static priority-based value
